name: Qube Holdings Limited
analysis: QUB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$5.0500. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.0900, stop A$4.9302, target A$5.5694 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
